listDirectoryTree.name: listDirectoryTree
listDirectoryTree.description: Lists the visible file tree beneath the project root. Returns a formatted tree representation of the visible project structure.

findLocation.name: findLocation
findLocation.description: Recursively searches within the accessible project area for files or directories whose base name exactly matches the provided name. Returns a sorted list of relative paths for every matching file or directory.

name.description: The exact file or directory name to search for.

readContext.name: readContext
readContext.description: Reads the contents of a file or, if the path is a directory, reads and combines the contents of its direct child files. Returns the file contents, or combined contents of the direct child files in the directory.

targetPath.description: The relative path of the file or directory to read.

deleteDirectory.name: deleteDirectory
deleteDirectory.description: Deletes a directory recursively from the accessible project area after user confirmation. Returns the absolute path of the deleted directory.

directoryPath.description: The relative path of the directory to delete.

deleteFile.name: deleteFile
deleteFile.description: Deletes a file from the accessible project area after user confirmation. Returns the absolute path of the deleted file.

filePath.description: The relative path of the file to delete.

appendToFile.name: appendToFile
appendToFile.description: Appends text to an existing file in the accessible project area. Returns the absolute path of the modified file.

filePath.description: The relative path of the file to append to.

contents.description: The text content to append to the file.

createFile.name: createFile
createFile.description: Creates a file in the accessible project area and writes the provided contents to it. Missing parent directories are created automatically. Returns the absolute path of the created file.

filePath.description: The relative path of the file to create.

contents.description: The text content to write into the new file.

createDirectory.name: createDirectory
createDirectory.description: Creates a directory in the accessible project area. Missing parent directories are created automatically. Returns the absolute path of the created directory.

directoryPath.description: The relative path of the directory to create.

runTerminal.name: runTerminal
runTerminal.description: Runs a UNIX-based terminal command from the accessible project root after explicit user confirmation. Returns the terminal output as a string.

command.description: The UNIX-based terminal command to execute from the project root.

savePlan.name: savePlan
savePlan.description: Creates a markdown planning file under the REPL root agent-plans directory. Returns the generated planning file name once it has been written.

name.description: Base name to use for the planning file.

content.description: Markdown content to write into the planning file.

readPlan.name: readPlan
readPlan.description: Reads a markdown planning file from the root agent-plans directory. Returns the contents of the planning file.

spawnAgent.name: spawnAgent
spawnAgent.description: Starts an agent in the current mode using the provided short agent name and prompt. Returns the eventual agent response.

agentName.description: The short agent name to run in the current mode, without the mode prefix. Examples: 'planner', 'executor'

prompt.description: The prompt text to send to the spawned agent.
